failure_reason: Added the witness oracle emission ledger carrier. The script reads the live Mac witness /state endpoint, derives summary-only STT/vision/multimodal/GPU process rows, labels, heldout rows, and emission cycles, writes native receipt ledger JSON records under .cache/witness-oracle-emissions, and refuses stale/non-live mic-camera-GPU state by default. Unit tests pass. The live localhost witness probe wrote a blocked receipt because present=false and both sampled cycles had seq=1522. The existing Form receipt contract still proves 16777215 four-way with 1 ok and 0 divergent.
